name: @intentsolutionsio/smoke-test-runner
description: Quick smoke test suites to verify critical functionality after deployments

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install smoke-test-runner\\n  or /plugin install smoke-test-runner@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
